节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: The CommonEventManager module provides common event capabilities, including the capabilities to publish, subscribe to, and unsubscribe from common events.
Publishes a common event. This API uses an asynchronous callback to return the result.
注释信息: @param { string } event - Name of the common event to publish. For details, see System Common Events.
@param { AsyncCallback<void> } callback - Callback to execute after the event is published.
@throws { BusinessError } 1500003 - The common event sending frequency too high.
@throws { BusinessError } 1500007 - Failed to send the message to the common event service.
@throws { BusinessError } 1500008 - Failed to initialize the common event service.
@throws { BusinessError } 1500009 - Failed to obtain system parameters.

parameters.说明: Name of the common event to publish. For details, see System Common Events.
Callback to execute after the event is published.

error_codes.description: The common event sending frequency too high.
Failed to send the message to the common event service.
Failed to initialize the common event service.
Failed to obtain system parameters.

节点.功能描述: Publishes a common event. This API uses an asynchronous callback to return the result.
注释信息: @param { string } event - Name of the common event to publish. For details, see System Common Events.
@param { CommonEventPublishData } options - Attributes of the common event to publish.
@param { AsyncCallback<void> } callback - Callback used to return the result.
@throws { BusinessError } 1500003 - The common event sending frequency too high.
@throws { BusinessError } 1500007 - Failed to send the message to the common event service.
@throws { BusinessError } 1500008 - Failed to initialize the common event service.
@throws { BusinessError } 1500009 - Failed to obtain system parameters.

parameters.说明: Name of the common event to publish. For details, see System Common Events.
Attributes of the common event to publish.
Callback used to return the result.

error_codes.description: The common event sending frequency too high.
Failed to send the message to the common event service.
Failed to initialize the common event service.
Failed to obtain system parameters.

Creates a subscriber. This API uses an asynchronous callback to return the result.

节点.功能描述:
Creates a subscriber. The API returns the result synchronously.
2. Incorrect parameter types. 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @returns { CommonEventSubscriber } Promise used to return the subscriber object.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.

节点.功能描述: Subscribes to a common event. This API uses an asynchronous callback to return the result.
注释信息: @param { AsyncCallback<CommonEventData> } callback - Callback used to return the result.
@throws { BusinessError } 1500007 - Failed to send the message to the common event service.
@throws { BusinessError } 1500008 - Failed to initialize the common event service.
@throws { BusinessError } 1500010 - The count of subscriber exceed system specification.

parameters.说明: Callback used to return the result.

error_codes.description: capability not supported
Failed to send the message to the common event service.
Failed to initialize the common event service.
The count of subscriber exceed system specification.

节点.功能描述:
Subscribes to a common event, and returns the result by promise that resolves with a success or
rejects with a failure code.
注释信息: @param { CommonEventSubscriber } subscriber - Indicate the subscriber of the common event.
@param { Callback<CommonEventData> } callback - The callback function used to receive the CommonEventData object.
@returns { Promise<void> } A promise that indicates whether the subscription was successful.
@throws { BusinessError } 1500007 - Failed to send the message to the common event service.
@throws { BusinessError } 1500008 - Failed to initialize the common event service.
@throws { BusinessError } 1500010 - The count of subscriber exceed system specification.

parameters.说明: Indicate the subscriber of the common event.
The callback function used to receive the CommonEventData object.

节点.return_description: A promise that indicates whether the subscription was successful.

error_codes.description: Capability not supported.
Failed to send the message to the common event service.
Failed to initialize the common event service.
The count of subscriber exceed system specification.

节点.功能描述:
Unsubscribes from a common event. This API uses an asynchronous callback to return the result.
2. Incorrect parameter types. 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { AsyncCallback<void> } [callback] - Callback used to return the result.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
@throws { BusinessError } 1500007 - Failed to send the message to the common event service.
@throws { BusinessError } 1500008 - Failed to initialize the common event service.

parameters.说明: AsyncCallback<void> } [callback] - Callback used to return the result.

error_codes.description: Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
capability not supported
Failed to send the message to the common event service.
Failed to initialize the common event service.

节点.功能描述: The event type that the commonEvent supported.
This commonEvent means when the device is booted or system upgrade completed, and only be sent by system. This API can be called only by system applications.
This commonEvent means when the device finnish booting, but still in the locked state.
This commonEvent means when the device is shutting down, note: turn off, not sleeping.
This commonEvent means when the charging state, level and so on about the battery.
This commonEvent means when the device in low battery state..
This commonEvent means when the battery level is an ok state.
This commonEvent means when the other power is connected to the device.
This commonEvent means when the other power is removed from the device.
This commonEvent means when the screen is turned off.
This commonEvent means when the device is awakened and interactive.
This commonEvent means when the thermal state level change
This commonEvent means when the device is about to enter the force sleep mode
This commonEvent means when the device exits the force sleep mode
This commonEvent means when the device is about to enter the hibernate mode
This commonEvent means when the device exits the hibernate mode
This commonEvent means when the user is present after the device is awakened.
This commonEvent means when the current time is changed.
This commonEvent means when the time is set.
This commonEvent means when the current date is changed.
This commonEvent means when the time zone is changed.
This commonEvent means when the dialog to dismiss.
This commonEvent means when a new application package is installed on the device.
This commonEvent means when a new version application package is installed on the device and replace the old version.the data contains the name of the package.
This commonEvent means when a new version application package is installed on the device and replace the old version, it does not contain additional data and only be sent to the replaced application.
This commonEvent means when an existing application package is removed from the device.
This commonEvent means when an existing application package is removed from the device.
This commonEvent means when an existing application package is completely removed from the device.
This commonEvent means when an existing application package has been changed.
This commonEvent means the user has restarted a package, and all of its processes have been killed.
This commonEvent means the user has cleared the package data.
This commonEvent means the user has cleared the package cache.
This commonEvent means the packages have been suspended.
This commonEvent means the packages have been un-suspended.
This commonEvent Sent to a package that has been suspended by the system.
Sent to a package that has been un-suspended.
A user id has been removed from the system.
The application is first launched after installed.
Sent by system package verifier when a package need to be verified.
Sent by system package verifier when a package is verified.
Resources for a set of packages (which were previously unavailable) are currently available since the media on which they exist is available.
Resources for a set of packages are currently unavailable since the media on which they exist is unavailable.
The device configuration such as orientation,locale have been changed.
The current device's locale has changed.
Indicates low memory condition notification acknowledged by user and package management should be started.
Send by the smart function when the system in drive mode.
Send by the smart function when the system in home mode.
Send by the smart function when the system in office mode.
Remind new user of preparing to start.
Remind previous user of that the service has been the background.
Remind new user of that the service has been the foreground.
Remind new user of that the service has been switched to new user. This API can be called only by system applications.
Remind new user of that the service has been starting. This API can be called only by system applications.
Remind new user of that the service has been unlocked.
Remind new user of that the service has been stopping. This API can be called only by system applications.
Remind new user of that the service has stopped.
Distributed account login successfully.
Distributed account logout successfully.
Distributed account is invalid.
Distributed account logs off.
WIFI state.
WIFI scan results.
WIFI RSSI change.
WIFI connect state.
WIFI hotspot state.
WIFI ap sta join.
WIFI ap sta join.
Indicates Wi-Fi MpLink state notification acknowledged by binding or unbinding MpLink.
Indicates Wi-Fi P2P connection state notification acknowledged by connecting or disconnected P2P.
Indicates that the Wi-Fi P2P state change.
Indicates that the Wi-Fi P2P peers state change.
Indicates that the Wi-Fi P2P discovery state change.
Indicates that the Wi-Fi P2P current device state change.
Indicates that the Wi-Fi P2P group info is changed.

Sent when stop charging battery.
Sent when start charging battery.
Sent when device's idle mode changed
Sent when device's charge idle mode changed.
Sent when device's power save mode changed
User added. This API can be called only by system applications.
User removed. This API can be called only by system applications.
Sent when ability is added.
Sent when ability is removed.
Sent when ability is updated.
Gps mode state changed.
The ivi is about to go into sleep state when the ivi is turned off power. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.
The ivi is slept and notify the app stop playing. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.
The ivi is standby and notify the app stop playing. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.
The app stop playing and save state. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.
The ivi is voltage abnormal. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.
The ivi temperature is too high. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.this common event will be delete later, please use COMMON_EVENT_IVI_TEMPERATURE_ABNORMAL.
The ivi temperature is extreme high. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.this common event will be delete later, please use COMMON_EVENT_IVI_TEMPERATURE_ABNORMAL.
The ivi temperature is abnormal. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.
The ivi voltage is recovery. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.
The ivi temperature is recovery. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.
The battery service is active. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.
The usb state change events. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.
The usb port changed. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.
The usb device attached. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.
The usb device detached. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.
The usb accessory attached. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.
The usb accessory detached. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.
The external storage was removed. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.
The external storage was unmounted. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.
The external storage was mounted. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.
The external storage was bad removal. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.
The external storage was unmountable. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.
The external storage was eject. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.
The external storage was removed. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system. This API can be called only by system applications.
The external storage was unmounted. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system. This API can be called only by system applications.
The external storage was mounted. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system. This API can be called only by system applications.
The external storage was bad removal. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system. This API can be called only by system applications.
The external storage was eject. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system. This API can be called only by system applications.
The visible of account was updated. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.
Account was deleted. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system. This API can be called only by system applications.
Foundation was ready. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.
Indicates the common event Action indicating that the airplane mode status of the device changes. Users can register this event to listen to the change of the airplane mode status of the device.
sent by the window manager service when the window mode is split.
The notification slot has been updated. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system. This API can be called only by system applications.
Indicate the action of a common event that the spn display information has been updated. This common event can be triggered only by system.
Indicate the result of quick fix apply. This common event can be triggered only by system.
Indicate the result of quick fix revoke. This common event can be triggered only by system.
Indicate the action of a common event that the user information has been updated. This common event can be triggered only by system.
Indicate http proxy has been changed. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.
Indicates the action of a common event that the phone SIM card state has changed. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.

Indicates the action of a common event that the call state has been changed. To subscribe to this protected common event, your application must have the ohos.permission.GET_TELEPHONY_STATE permission. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.
Indicates the action of a common event that the network state has been changed. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.
Indicates the action of a common event that the signal info has been changed. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.
This commonEvent means when the screen is unlocked.
This commonEvent means when the screen is locked.
Indicates the action of a common event that the network connectivity changed. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.

Indicates the action of a common event that bluetooth handsfree ag connection state change. To subscribe to this protected common event, your application must have the ohos.permission.ACCESS_BLUETOOTH
This common event means that minors mode is enabled. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.
This common event means that minors mode is disabled. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.
This common event means that datashare is ready. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.
Indicates the action of a common event that bluetooth a2dp source connection state change. To subscribe to this protected common event, your application must have the ohos.permission.ACCESS_BLUETOOTH
Indicates the action of a common event that bluetooth avrcp connection state change. To subscribe to this protected common event, your application must have the ohos.permission.ACCESS_BLUETOOTH
Indicates the action of a common event that bluetooth codec change. To subscribe to this protected common event, your application must have the ohos.permission.ACCESS_BLUETOOTH
Indicates the action of a common event that bluetooth remote device acl state change. To subscribe to this protected common event, your application must have the ohos.permission.ACCESS_BLUETOOTH
Indicates the action of a common event that bluetooth pair state change. To subscribe to this protected common event, your application must have the ohos.permission.ACCESS_BLUETOOTH
Indicates that the managed browser policy is changed. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.
This common event means that Kiosk mode is on. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.
This common event means that Kiosk mode is off. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.
This common event means that the open and closed state of the stand associated with the tablet mode has changed. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.
This common event means that the state (open or closed) of the laptop lid has changed. This is a protected common event that can only be sent by system.
